use_cases: Form submission and action triggering across web applications
Navigation triggers and CTA buttons in landing pages
Interactive UI elements in dashboards and interfaces
ai_summary: A reusable Button component with configurable variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes (default, sm, lg, icon). Built on Radix UI Slot for composition flexibility and uses class-variance-authority for consistent styling. Includes standard accessibility attributes like focus-visible ring and disabled states.
